TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Skgigun, title = Skgigun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Skgigun} }

S.FORM: = Skgigun = Ex: , kiya ka sqitun daha ma skgigun daha. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = skgigun = əx: , kija ka sqitun daħa ma skgigun daħa. pnjaħan pnatas
